best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: user successfully logs in module: login/registration source pages: 3.0 preconditions: user is not logged in. test data: - email: test@example.com - password: testpassword test steps: 1. user enters their email and password. 2. system checks if the user exists in the database. 3. system verifies the password using bcrypt. 4. system generates a jwt token. 5. system revokes any existing tokens for the user. 6. system inserts a new token into the database. 7. system sends the jwt token to the client. expected result: user is logged in and receives a valid jwt token.
